build-native.description: Build the native ML-DSA-65 addon (.node) for the current platform from locked deps and the pinned toolchain, then write its .sha256 sidecar (verified before dlopen). Requires a Rust toolchain + cmake.

commands: cargo deny --all-features check advisories bans licenses sources

audit-native.description: Rust supply-chain gates for the native addon (#277): RustSec advisories plus cargo-deny bans/licenses/sources, covering the aws-lc-sys cmake/cc build-time surface. Requires cargo-audit + cargo-deny.
